channel.title: optimization on evocations
channel.description: Recent content in optimization on evocations

item.title: Multipliers
item.description: Life is finite. How do you do the most you possibly can while you’re alive? Not in an inhuman, mechanical sense – doing as much as possible in pursuit of as deeply intricate a life as possible. In order to pursue more aims, faster, with less resistance, towards whatever you desire. As human beings, putting away hours every day, you can take two approaches. The first is additive. Every day, put away the hours.
